roles.name: Chair of Archaeology
roles.description: Tenured scholar who designs the over-arching expedition plan and safeguards its scholarly integrity.

roles.name: Expedition Leader
roles.description: Marshals the field team, holds the timeline, and answers to the museum board.

roles.name: Curator of the Catalogue
roles.description: Steward of every artifact record, layout, field, and permission set.

roles.name: Master Cryptologist
roles.description: Decodes ancient scripts and forges Apex, LWC, and platform features for the dig.

roles.name: Dean of American Antiquities
roles.description: Captain of the New England research circuit — sets standards and mentors the senior fellows.

roles.name: Senior Field Archaeologist
roles.description: Leads survey grids and translates the customer's wishes into trenches and finds.

roles.name: Junior Field Archaeologist
roles.description: Carries discovery and configuration into the field under the senior's eye.

roles.name: Bridgemaster of the Mine Cars
roles.description: Architect of the great spans between Salesforce and the realms beyond — APIs, events, and rope bridges alike.

roles.name: Senior Bridge Engineer
roles.description: Lays the rivets of API, middleware, and event flows under the Bridgemaster's plan.

roles.name: Apprentice Bridge Engineer
roles.description: Learns the craft of integration — webhooks, batch, callouts, and the snake-pit patterns of error handling.

roles.name: Conservator of the Vaults
roles.description: Tests every relic before display — finds the curses and cracks before they reach the public exhibit.

roles.name: Director of Public Outreach
roles.description: Lifts the banner for the museum's discoveries — leads all marketing craft for the expedition.

roles.name: Senior Curator of Exhibits
roles.description: Strategist of campaigns — sounds the call to gather visitors and donors.

roles.name: Exhibit Designer
roles.description: Carries the campaign forward into the field — content, creative, and the daily exhibit signage.

roles.name: Field Notes Scribe
roles.description: Records every field journal entry — translates between the curator and the cryptologist's craft.

roles.name: Master Tomb Engineer
roles.description: The senior dwarf-of-the-deep — engineers traps, pressure plates, and complex platform mechanics.

roles.name: Trail-Hand Surveyor
roles.description: Earliest of the dig team — totes the theodolite, runs the chain, and learns the trade in the dust.

_realmNotes: windowOffsetWeeks values are negative so every realm starts at least one month in the past — past weeks get Time Entries (Step 6), future weeks get Schedules. Workstreams are organised as parent scope items (each with 2-3 child sub-scopes) — the wizard inserts parents first, then children with Parent_WorkStream__c set.

realms.projectName: Raiders of the Lost Ark — Tanis Excavation Platform
Temple of Doom — Sankara Stones Recovery
Last Crusade — Holy Grail Knowledge Base

children.name: Path of God Leap of Faith Bridge

workstreams.name: Testing at the Canyon of the Crescent Moon

realms.projectName: Crystal Skull & Dial of Destiny — Akator Time Platform

raiders-lost-ark.name: Headpiece Authenticated
raiders-lost-ark.description: Discovery sign-off — Marion's medallion verified at Marshall College.

raiders-lost-ark.name: Map Room Sun Strike
raiders-lost-ark.description: Build kickoff: the staff of Ra casts its beam on the model city.

raiders-lost-ark.name: Well of Souls Opened
raiders-lost-ark.description: Mid-project gate: shaft excavation reviewed and signed off.

raiders-lost-ark.name: Cairo Bazaar Diversion
raiders-lost-ark.description: Phase invoice trigger: feint through the bazaar to draw the Nazis off.

raiders-lost-ark.name: Ark Delivered to Washington
raiders-lost-ark.description: Go-Live: the Ark crated and shipped to the Top Men.

temple-of-doom.name: Nightclub Hand-off
temple-of-doom.description: Project kickoff: diamond and antidote exchanged at Club Obi Wan.

temple-of-doom.name: Crash-Land at Mayapore
temple-of-doom.description: Build phase begins: raft-landing in the Indian foothills.

temple-of-doom.name: Sankara Stones Recovered
temple-of-doom.description: UAT gate: the three glowing stones in hand.

temple-of-doom.name: Mine Cart Escape Run
temple-of-doom.description: Stress drill: full run of the mine cart network under load.

temple-of-doom.name: Rope Bridge Severed
temple-of-doom.description: Phase invoice trigger: Mola Ram and the Thuggees cut loose.

temple-of-doom.name: Stones Returned to Mayapore
temple-of-doom.description: Go-Live: village restored, children home, hyper-care begins.

last-crusade.name: Cross of Coronado Recovered
last-crusade.description: Discovery: the cross finally where it belongs — in a museum.

last-crusade.name: Catacombs Beneath Venice
last-crusade.description: Build kickoff: rats, oil, and the Knight's tomb located.

last-crusade.name: Brunwald Castle Rescue
last-crusade.description: Mid-project gate: Henry Sr. retrieved, diary recovered.

last-crusade.name: Berlin Diary Reclaimed
last-crusade.description: Phase invoice trigger: autograph from the Führer secured.

last-crusade.name: Three Trials Cleared
last-crusade.description: Go-Live: Breath, Word, and Path of God all passed.

last-crusade.name: Ride into the Sunset
last-crusade.description: Hyper-care close: Grail left in the Canyon, team rides west.

kingdom-crystal-skull-and-dial.name: Hangar 51 Break-In
kingdom-crystal-skull-and-dial.description: Discovery: Soviets crash the warehouse, kickoff forced.

kingdom-crystal-skull-and-dial.name: Oxley Field Notes Decoded
kingdom-crystal-skull-and-dial.description: Build phase: the riddle of Akator translated.

kingdom-crystal-skull-and-dial.name: Antikythera Half-Dial Found
kingdom-crystal-skull-and-dial.description: Mid-project gate: Helena delivers the second half of the Dial.

kingdom-crystal-skull-and-dial.name: Tuk-Tuk Chase Through Tangier
kingdom-crystal-skull-and-dial.description: Stress drill: full pursuit through the medina under live fire.

kingdom-crystal-skull-and-dial.name: Akator Temple Revealed
kingdom-crystal-skull-and-dial.description: Go-Live: the crystal throne returns to its rightful place.

kingdom-crystal-skull-and-dial.name: Marshall College Reinstatement
kingdom-crystal-skull-and-dial.description: Final invoice: tenured chair restored, retirement deferred.

Marion Ravenwood.notes: Reopening The Raven in Nepal — annual ledger close.

Dr. Marcus Brody.notes: Lost in his own museum again — staff sent search party.

Sallah.notes: Family time in Cairo — many, many children.

Short Round.notes: Driving practice — Dr. Jones said he is ready.

Henry Jones Sr..notes: Library research in Oxford — do NOT call him 'Junior'.

Dr. Elsa Schneider.notes: Austrian alpine retreat — 'belongs in a museum' conference.

Helena Shaw.notes: Tangier auction circuit — strictly above board.

Professor Oxley.notes: Recuperation — extended exposure to crystal skull.

Mola Ram.notes: Annual Kali devotional fast — no calls.
